content.heading: 🔐 Account Verification
content.message: Thank you for registering with DeployIO. To complete your account verification, please use the following One-Time Password (OTP):

mainAction.style: background-color: rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.3); border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; text-align: center; margin: 24px 0; backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
mainAction.innerStyle: font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 36px; font-weight: 600; color: #a855f7; letter-spacing: 6px;
mainAction.subtitle: 📱 Enter this code in the verification form

warning.text: ⚠️ Important: This OTP expires in 10 minutes. For security reasons, do not share this code with anyone. If you didn't request this verification, please ignore this email.

support.text: 💬 If you need assistance, please contact our support team.

content.heading: 🔑 Password Reset Request
content.message: We received a request to reset the password for your DeployIO account. If you made this request, please click the button below to create a new password:

mainAction.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #a855f7; color: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; transition: all 0.3s ease; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px 0 rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.3);

warning.text: 🛡️ Security Notice: This reset link expires in 30 minutes. If you didn't request this password reset, please ignore this email and your password will remain unchanged.

fallback.title: 🔧 Having trouble with the button?
fallback.text: Copy and paste this link into your browser:

support.text: 💬 If you continue to have problems, please contact our support team for assistance.
